seoTitle: Charnwood vs Chifley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Charnwood and Chifley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Charnwood and Chifley.
heading: Charnwood vs Chifley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Charnwood, Australian Capital Territory and Chifley, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chifley has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Charnwood (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Charnwood or Chifley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Charnwood has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Chifley scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Charnwood scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Chifley scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Charnwood or Chifley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chifley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
